content: The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows the relationship between two EMAs. MACD Line = 12-day EMA minus 26-day EMA. Signal Line = 9-day EMA of MACD Line. Histogram = MACD Line minus Signal Line. Crossovers signal momentum shifts; histogram expansion/contraction shows momentum strength. Zero-line crossovers indicate trend changes. Best used with other indicators due to lag.
